struct Particle {
    x: f32,
    y: f32,
    z: f32,
    vx: f32,
    vy: f32,
    vz: f32,
    mass: f32,
    charge: f32,
    lifetime: f32,
    active: bool,
}

fn update_particles(particles: &mut [Particle], dt: f32) {
    for p in particles.iter_mut() {
        p.x += p.vx * dt;
        p.y += p.vy * dt;
        p.z += p.vz * dt;
        let ax = p.charge * 0.1 / p.mass;
        let ay = p.charge * 0.1 / p.mass;
        let az = -9.8 / p.mass;
        p.vx += ax * dt;
        p.vy += ay * dt;
        p.vz += az * dt;
        p.lifetime -= dt;
        if p.lifetime <= 0.0 {
            p.active = false;
        }
    }
}

fn compute_energy(particles: &[Particle]) -> f32 {
    let mut total = 0.0f32;
    for p in particles.iter() {
        let speed_sq = p.vx * p.vx + p.vy * p.vy + p.vz * p.vz;
        total += 0.5 * p.mass * speed_sq;
        total += p.charge * p.x;
        total += p.charge * p.y;
    }
    total
}
